overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a character walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit city at night. The journey transitions from a covered plaza with a digital cherry blossom tree, through traditional Japanese-inspired walkways, up stairs via a red torii gate, and into the open cyberpunk downtown with towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered cyberpunk plaza with digital art installation

agents.ego_description: walking through covered plaza past digital cherry blossom tree and neon storefronts

entered.detail: large artificial tree with glowing pink digital blossoms and illuminated circular base
illuminated sign reading BIG JACK STREET in pink neon letters
overhead roof structure providing partial cover over the plaza
various colorful neon advertisements and storefront signs

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a semi-covered cyberpunk plaza at night, featuring a prominent digital cherry blossom tree with glowing pink blossoms in the center. The wet paved tiles reflect the surrounding neon signs including a large BIG JACK STREET sign. The character walks forward through this sheltered area with sparse pedestrian activity and metal railings lining the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional Japanese covered walkway with futuristic lighting

events.description: entering covered walkway with distinct glowing blue floor panels and traditional roof structure

agents.ego_description: walking through covered walkway with traditional Japanese architectural elements and glowing floor

entered.detail: glowing cyan-blue illuminated floor panels lining the walkway
traditional curved roof structure with upturned eaves and red support pillars
traditional red Japanese lanterns hanging from the roof structure
traditional stone lantern structures with warm glowing lights

segments.scene_description: The character enters a distinct covered walkway featuring traditional Japanese architecture mixed with cyberpunk elements. The floor is composed of glowing blue panels, while red paper lanterns and stone lanterns line the path. The space is mostly enclosed with traditional roof structures overhead, creating a sheltered environment distinct from the previous plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley leading to monumental stairway with torii gate

events.description: exiting covered walkway into darker alley with graffiti-covered walls
beginning ascent of concrete stairs through red torii gate

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs through a large red torii gate following another character in a red jacket

notable_agents.action: character in red jacket ascending stairs ahead of ego

entered.detail: wall covered in colorful cyberpunk graffiti and street art
large traditional red Japanese torii gate marking the stairway entrance
wide concrete staircase ascending between dark walls
tall vertical neon advertisement signs on surrounding buildings

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to a darker, narrower alley with graffiti-covered walls and pink neon lighting. The character approaches and begins ascending a wide concrete staircase framed by a large red torii gate. Another character in a red jacket is visible ahead, climbing the same stairs toward the open city above.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy cyberpunk downtown street with vehicle traffic and holographic ads

events.description: emerging from stairs into open city street with towering skyscrapers and full sky visibility
futuristic black vehicle drives past on the wet asphalt street

agents.ego_description: walking along wet city streets surrounded by towering skyscrapers and neon advertisements

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving along the wet asphalt road

entered.detail: massive futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows rising into the night sky
large floating holographic advertisements and building-sized video screens
rain-soaked asphalt road reflecting the colorful neon lights
orange metal barriers separating pedestrian walkway from vehicle lanes
elevated walkway connecting buildings with neon underlighting

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the stairway into a vast open cyberpunk downtown. Towering skyscrapers with holographic billboards dominate the skyline while the wet asphalt streets reflect the intense neon lighting in pink and cyan hues. The camera follows the character along the busy sidewalk separated from the sparse vehicle traffic by orange barriers, passing various storefronts and pedestrians in the rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, neon-lit plaza into the vast, rain-soaked expanse of a cyberpunk downtown. It begins in a semi-covered area centered around a glowing digital cherry blossom tree, where wet tiles reflect the surrounding signs as the character walks forward. As the path progresses, the environment shifts into a covered walkway blending traditional Japanese architecture with glowing blue floor panels and red lanterns. The scene then narrows into a dark, graffiti-lined alley before ascending a wide concrete staircase framed by a large red torii gate. Finally, the camera emerges from the stairs into the open city, where towering skyscrapers and holographic billboards dominate a skyline reflected in the pink and cyan hues of the wet asphalt streets.
